star_1.text: EDIT: I'm deleting this game. The odds of getting a new character decreases dramatically after you put in so much effort for coins and spend more time watching ads than you do actually playing, that this game is not even worth it. You don't get a new character and the game says, "oh well, tough luck," and Hipster Whale offers absolutely no solution.

so I've been playing for years and I love the game. it's unfortunate that the creators refuse to assist you in any way. I recently changed devices after my last one broke. and when I did so all my coins were gone..so I emailed support and never heard back from them. there isn't much point in playing if all the hours you put in are undone by simply changing devices, and support unwilling to assist you.

I like this game, but I just spent 200 coins only to get two duplicate characters. No compensation, nothing to have a little bit back for the next 100. This is just lowkey pathetic how they want you to do micro transactions, so, a 1 star is well deserved. Otherwise it would have been a 5.

I've played this game before, but this version has NO settings at all. Just open the app and click play. There's no way to turn off the in-game sounds (clucking chickens, traffic, etc). You can't listen to music or an audiobook without having chicken noises overlaid on top.
this game is so bad I get ads every round there is two player on the same phone so we need to stick to each other I don't recommend if there was 0 stars I could of gave

game used to be amazing, now the rewards from the event are trash, 3rd place gets the same reward as 10th place, no more green coins, thats the only reason I tried the events was for the green tokens to unlock characters. now I can't unlock characters without money, ultra lame update, debating on uninstalling

They completely stayed true to their roots from a few years ago, just a very fun game overall. Edited... 120 second UNSCIPABLE AD, are you kidding me with this, with the extra 2 small ads it comes up to 129 seconds of UNSCIPABLE ads, is this legal??? Is this allowed how long will it be before you give me a 300 second ad, absolutely disgusting.

amount of ads is asinine. also the duplicate chances are ridiculous. and i watched an ad to guarantee a new prize but 1. the ad was about ai 🤢 2. i had to click out of it 3 separate times??? 3. the third time i tried it linked me to the app store and when i went back, the app refreshed, i lost coins, and did not get a new prize. how the mighty have fallen.
used to enjoy this game until I was forced to play with a "gamepad" on my TV after a recent update. ruined my joy for the game.

The amounts of ads is killing me, also their support is non existent, they don't answer emails at all!!!! There is an ad every second time you die. after you get 80+ characters prize machine is an absolute disaster, I get duplicates every time I play the prize machine and very often you can't even play it again to get a new duplicate character!!!!! and I keep getting dublicates ALWAYS 2+ times in a row. This is a disaster not a game, it turned into a donate scam.

why doesn't people in Crossy road don't have eyes and where does the cars come from and the cows block our way. and why do the cars go slow . and why do you guy's make the road so long that we Lose so fast. the cars never stop coming. the game never stops . and whoever made Crossy road you need to fix the characters, the way the cars look like and you guy's must stop the payment . and I don't like the game at all 1/5.
this game on TV is the worst game possible because when I tap it doesn't go forward but when I don't tap it goes forward and whenever I try to claim my coins I lost coins

way way way too many ads ...an ad every 2 tries..little bit over excessive..which is to bad because its a fun game..but so many ads it makes you wanna barf....if i wanted any of these games in the ads id probably have downloaded them already on my own so i dont need them shoved in my face every 2 seconds..hint hint i dont care. and no im not paying $9 (hahahahaha) to get rid of the ads.

Fortnite is free to play, if you want you can buy a skin for $10. The amount of effort put into Fortnite is several orders of magnitude more than for crossy roads. This game asks you to pay $10 or otherwise you have to watch 1 minute long ads.

I've been getting a lot of duplicate characters lately. It's unbearable. I don't mind if there's a duplicate once or twice a day, but every time I get a duplicate every time I use the prize machine, that's a lot. Even when there was a 100% chance, I got a duplicate character .
ADS each time after you die ☠️ last time I played this game. game had a good run 🫡

I love this game but when I played it on my phone, I got one round in before it just sent me to a completely different game with no obvious way to get back to the main game. I downloaded this to play crossy road, not crashy road.

The Pecking Order is so unfair.Explain how you get 486 in just under 1 minute.And you scroll down on the leaderboard and see a "player" with only 4 steps, isn't that weird? Because how do you struggle at the first 4 steps,it got me thinking that the creators put random bots with steps that they didn't get,but given by creators.We literally struggle and the bots just get steps for free, and if they win they don't even get anything while we wasted time and effort struggling .I typed this around the time the goth girl Pecking Order started.
was having fun for barely 5 minutes and then was met with 3 step 30+ second fullscreen advertisement followed by a I game pop up asking for 9 dollars!! to get rid of ads, uninstall.
Honestly, I don't mind an ad or two to support the game. But unending, unexitable ads for that stupid match game is where I draw the line. uninstalled.

star_2.text: After playing for a while, it legitimately starts to get really unfun to unlock all of the characters. Pretty much every roll is a dupe and a complete waste of my time. Not to mention how annoying this game is with ads. You don't even need to play for 1 minute, yes, 1 whole minute to get an annoying 15-second ad. If I didn't close the app and reopen it each time I got an ad, I would've spent more time watching those than actually playing the game. Not worth it.

The update was cool and it feels more organized now, but there are so many ads now, and they keep becoming more frequent. Like there's an ad every two deaths now. I also keep getting duplicate characters and they want you to pay another 200 coins to respin, then another 500 if you get another duplicate plicate. I'm broke af. When I try to watch an ad (instead of pay) to try for another one it sometimes doesn't even work. Overall it is a fun game, it's very simple, lots of fun characters to get.

I love this game, I've played it now almost 4 years and have every character. Had not played in a while and recently reinstalled. I just got a notification that my data was running low... when I checked, this app has used over 6 GIGS of data in just 3 days!! Holy moly those ads must be crazy! Not everyone has unlimited data.. just wow.

TOO many ads. Even when getting characters, I almost only get duplicates (and I don't have many characters) I have to watch an ad to get another character... and sometimes, I even still get another duplicate!?!! I spend more time watching ads than playing the game. and if I deactivate internet to play, when I get a duplicate character... well I just spent 100 coins for nothing... great.

once you get a decent amount of characters, your chances of winning anything from the prize machine are slim to none. on top of that, the game freezes every 5 minutes (which may be a problem with my device) and there are forced ads every 2 deaths. overall awful experience, only reason that it's not one star is that i can play offline. P.S: dont give me that "you can get rid of ads by giving us money" stuff

18/2/25 The game has best graphics and so thing that it has many characters and now it has also colloborated with subway surfers but sometimes when I play picther it lag, hi it's 20/1/26 when I start the game the sound was very bad, then I started collecting coins my game crashed in TV then I start again, and it crashed that why I am not playing the game again.

Me and my bestie have different opinions. My opinion: This is a very frustrating game and I hate it,its very pointless and it should never been made. My bestie's opinion: This game is VERY fun but also a bit frustrating sometimes 😭

This game would be more fun if it was actually about crossing roads and less about the logs which make up two thirds of the game and which don't allow for dodging. This game really should be called 'Log Hopper'

the game itself is great,but the sound cuts off about 2 minutes into the game, I an really disappointed, I've played the game on the I-phone and sound works great,I've checked all settings on my phone,its really irritating 😡😡

It is actually really good, but after loading it for a while, I managed to collect the subway's characters, and then suddenly, the app won't open anymore. I've collected quite a lot of characters and didn’t want to risk deleting the app and downloading it again because then I'd lose all my characters. It's been a few days since the game can't open itself. I can't find anyone with the same problem on the Internet and has tried restarting my phone numerous times, but nothing works.
Ads every two games is kind of excessive
some ads from mintegral don't have any close button. I have to close the game and I don't get any rewards.

FUN. But I get an ad literally every other game so it's very much not worth it because no I'm not going to pay 9 bucks just to be able to play a very simple game in peace. I'll do a dollar store crossword puzzle at that point.
I would give a 5 stars if there's no duplicates I just spent 500 coins and I only got 1 new character can you imagine 500 COINS SPENT AND YOU GOT ONLY 1 NEW CHARACTER

Edited review. Had this on another phone and decided to play it again. That was a mistake. I don't remember the ads being this intrusive. Game is still fun, but man those ads are bad. Shouldn't have to out my phone into airplane mode just to enjoy a game. Fun game, great way to waste time, but honestly, getting the same characters over and over gets old. Save up 100 coins, win a prize, and get the same character already have. Ruins the fun of trying to get coins.

The game is really good up until you start to complete it. There are loads of different figurines to collects. However after that there isn't really anything else to do except take part in the pecking order to grind coins which is incredibly difficult, or just play the game. Updates don't come around regularly either so you're kind of screwed. There also isn't a lot of missions, yet alone variety of missions either. So the game becomes boring after a while.

Do NOT buy the ad blocker. Everytime I spent 100c to get a new character it would be a duplicate, then I'd watch an ad and it would be a duplicate again, watch an ad a second time and it would be a new character. With the ad blocker after the first reroll, you're just stuck and have to pay 200c more. So now every new character costs 300c. Sucks. I loved the game before I bought the ad blocker which is ironic.

This game used to be good. But, it is now more ads than game. The ads are not skippable, are frequently deceptive, repetative and trigger every 90 seconds or so (as far as I can tell). Supposedly you can pay $1 to suppress them. The author should just be honest and make the game cost $1 in the play store.

honestly a great game at first with all the charaters in the world!!! but after you have 130+ charaters, even trying to get new charaters is pointless... if you try the machine you will most likely get 3 duplicates. 3 is the most amount of chances you get before you just have to deal with what you get. they could have just gotten the chances for duplicates out of the game. they didnt and were stuck with this bull ( insert curse word here ).

This game isn't good enough for the amount of ads it has. You could watch the paid programming channel and not see as many advertisements. This game would be "not boring" enough to pass the time when you're in public or waiting or something, but the overload on ads makes you unable to play it and makes you not want to play it. And they want a netflix subscription per month to disable ads. Whoever said it was a good idea to put an ad after every run, I want what they're smoking

star_3.text: Great game, but there are now far too many ads. Being interrupted every 2 to 3 runs, regardless of length. Plus, the chance of winning a duplicate character, forcing you to watch further ads, ruins the enjoyment even more. Just had to sit through a 2 minute one, which is ridiculous. Thankfully, I didn't lose my 100 coins due to a glitch, getting nothing in return. This often happens. On the verge of uninstalling, which is a shame.

I love crossy road. Its so fun to do in your free time. You can play for an hour, or for a minute. Ive been playing this game for years with no problems, but one day I went to play it, and the characters kept getting stuck- like, they would hop a few spaces then just stop, and I would angrily tap on the screen. This has gotta be a bug from the update, so please fix it and I will change my review to 4/5 stars. :)

Game is fun. I've played it in arcades and thought this would be a good way to train up. It certainly is, but there's one massive flaw and that is: false advertising. It claims that if you pay for any purchase in the game, ads go away forever. Very untrue. I paid for a character and get ads every 4 rounds like normal. Either give me my money back or remove the ads like you promised.

Love the game, I play everyday. Ever since the new update, though, I can't play the prize machine, the button for it never pops up no matter how many coins I have. Also, the free gift every few hours is gone, as is the quest, ie. 300 hops, 12 lilypads, 10 logs. These were my favorite parts of the game and they're all gone since I updated.😞

A really fun game, but forces you to buy something so that you're not constantly interrupted every 3 or so games. Also, after getting about 20 characters duplicates will start to show up, in which case you have to watch several ads to even get a chance to get a new character, which is not guaranteed and often it's just a waste of time (and coins) because it doesn't work.

This game is amazing. The gameplay is so addictive, I can play forever. Characters are also kinda charming. HOWEVER, WHY DOES THERE HAVE TO BE FORCED ADDS. Sure, games have to make money, and the ad count is better than some (not good, however). I could just play on airplane mode, which is an easy solution, but if I didn't, IT WOULD COST 9 DOLLARS. That is an absolute crime, and extra characters won't fix it. That's why it's 3 stars. Fix this, and then it's an easy 5.

Fun to play, way too many ads, after only 3 runs, the third run after I die the silly thing shows 30 second ads, this frustrates me so very much and leads me not to play it. The characters are quite cool but the ones that are for trial costs so much money ($1.99aud). There is no accidental touch protection eg. I was on 350 taps and accidentally slightly tapped it I died, incredibly annoying. Overall Fun but extremely annoying

this is so fun and i love the skins. when I first got the game, pecking order worked then after a few weeks, it said it wad offline and it ahd been like that for more than 3 months. I cleared the apps cache and data and I made sure I was online and updated it to the latest update and it says the ame thing 😭. Now I cant play pecking order. is there a reason why this is happening?
Great game, fun and competitive! New challenges constantly, and countless skins to collect. However, the amount of ads is insane. Every 2 rounds there's a 30 second ad. I'm impatient enough...

the game is good, challenging but the ads are stupid. I don't mind ads but when you hit the X it takes you to Google to install the game. I just wanted it to go away so I can play. I guess I'll just delete the game if it keeps happening
this game was really fun and interesting to play, but I think there were too many ads, but overall, I give this game 3 stars, pls making adds happen literally after every three times or so thanks.
Not a bad game by any means. Just gets boring after a while. It sucks that other game modes cost.
I love this game! It makes me wanna pull my hair out which is just the kind of game I like! But what I didn't like is all the goddamn ads and the game trying to sell you skins.

well I feel this is a great game its just every 2 or 3 runs it depends you eather get a really long commercial or a short one it gets really annoying but im patient so I don't mind the commercial if im really not having it I'll back out if the game then enter again but I think its not worth all that trouble id rather do subway surfers than this but other than that no bugs pretty solid game

love Crossy road but the app gets really laggy sometimes and I don't know why. tried deleting and reinstalling but still the same. also they keep advertising ad free version after every ad and it's no good. have to deal with an ad and then another pop-up right after.
While I love this simple little game, an ad after only two games is outrageous.
very much enjoyed it but the ads are annoying for free users and the subscription too remove them is too expensive please remove the ads for free users to improve the experience
this is fun and addictive to play however we get free characters and free coins but 1 problem SO MANY ADS
ok so the games great but the only reason why I rate it 3 stars is because there are too many ads and I'm not paying for no ads

I used to love this game years back. I'd pull it out for a quick round every break time in college and I even enjoyed the giant arcade versions of the game. But I think it's hard to enjoy it like I used to with the amount of ads it has now. Every 2-3 times that my character dies, there's an advert. And I never write game reviews, so you can imagine how often it must happen to get to this point. Like I said, very good and nostalgic game, but way too many adverts to fully enjoy it :)

star_4.text: love this game! It's really fun to play and so many characters to play as, along with secret characters that you can only get while playing. The game works offline, so when I'm on the road, I have something to do when YouTube doesn't work. My only complaint is the amount of ads every couple of times you die, and sometimes I just want to go and free. Great game and good graphics!

I love this game so much! It's super and addictive!! I could play for hours with all of the different maps and characters! There aren't a lot of ads and when there are you can usually skip them pretty quickly! My only complaint is that I wish they did more events! I loved the Subway Surfers event and loved collecting the characters and boards in a certain number of days/weeks! If that is updated this review would totally be brought to a 5!!

I mean, the game is great! The only problem is that whenever I do the character gacha machine, I would get a duplicate, so I watch an ad to try again. However, sometimes after watching the ad, I would go back to the game to try again, and it would just be a slightly faded black screen. No gacha machine. Only the arrow on the top left pointing back to the game. No new character for me! Might be a bug? IDK.

The game is basically Frogger from a different angle, but that's not a bad thing. I've had a lot of fun playing it. There are a bunch of different characters, some that are pop culture references. My only beef is that recently it's stopped allowing me to buy new character (the chances of getting a new one go dramatically down the more you have), but it also is no longer giving me T coins. Maybe there'll be an update to fix that soon.

I like this game, pretty fun. I purchased the remove ads forever. The only thing that seems broken is sometimes when you die, the game offers you a character for .49 or .99 cents and also says "buy now for an extra 500coins". When I buy it immediately, (only if i liked the character) the character is in my collection but not the extra coins it promises. It's done this 3 times on me, so not sure I like being promised extra 500 coins and not getting them. Other than that, enjoying the game.

I absolutely love how derpy the characters in this game are. It's so amazing! There aren't many ads at all compared to other games, and it's offline so you can play it whenever. Although I really wish you could do something else with the duplicates that you get from the prize machine, because they do literally NOTHING. Besides that, this game is a pretty good game!

I like the game overall. It's really fun and addictive. The only problem I have are the ads. I know you need them for money, but there's also that one ad that keeps repeating. It gets annoying. I would wish for you to at least vary the ads you bring to make players less bored. But I love this app and would recommend it! It really is a time consumer! 4 stars.

Okay, love the game. I played a lot about a year ago and just recently downloaded it again. However now I see they have added an competitive aspect. I enjoy it since you can also get prizes, however everytime I participate the next day (after it has ended) I go on the game and it freezes. This wouldn't be as much of a problem if it didn't freeze my WHOLE phone. I have to take out my battery just to put my phone back to normal. Please fix ASAP. Other wise very good game.

I really love this game! It gives a huge variety of characters to play as, and unlock. And I really like how for depending on what character your playing as, the map will change. Like for a halloween character then the map would turn halloween themed. But 1 thing I would add is an a way to see how to unlock characters/maps. There would have to be some things that you unlock yourself, but there should also be a few that tell you how to unlock them. But overall, this is a fun game to play.

One thing that hasn't been mentioned is the character slot machine. I really can't stand how after a while, it has a tendency to give you a duplicate every single time you feed it coins. Nearly without fail. And usually, you don't even get a new character after having to watch an ad the first time until your second ad and it finally says you have a 100% chance. If it was truly random, you couldn't guarentee that. Forcing ads down our throat is all it is.

Almost perfect version of frogger mixed with minecraft graphics. Love that the skins change the level as well. I only have a few minor issues. 1 can't turn off just the music, I usually listen to podcasts but cant leave the effects going without the music. 2 I dont like some of the traps. Like a single leaf in the water behind a tree. Or 2 logs moving so fast cant get past. 3 the coins are never worth going after for, the value should be upped to 3 or 5 to make it worth going after. Imo

It's a really fun and entertaining game. Just wish you couldn't get duplicates. The first couple times it was okay because I could just watch an ad to get a new one that was hopefully not another duplicate. Now, my only option is to put in another 200c for a 70% chance to not get another duplicate because there are "no ads available." Maybe fix this or make it almost impossible to get a duplicate? Would've rated 5 starts if it wasn't for that.

I love this app, and I've had it since forever. It's one of my earliest apps. Ads aren't a problem, beacause you can't control them, and I really wish people would stop complaining and stop rating apps based on ads. Anyway, for some reason, I can't purchase figurines. I really want the piggy bank, but it always says, "Unable to purchase figurine at this time." Please fix, so you can earn your money you deserve.

Why did the chicken cross the road? I absolutely love crossy road. Or LOVED. I still really enjoy the gameplay and the idea of getting free characters from machines and things like that. HOWEVER, as much as this is a brilliant game, I don't like the amount of ads. Every couple times I die I get an advert or a "word from their sponsors" as Crossy Road calls it. It's fine, but the adverts are quite long and it puts me off so that's why 4 stars Still good game though

This game is awsome!!!. You can get money and go to the machine and there is free Avatars ones for you to start!. The only problem with this game is that it has ads and there is not alot of them. The problem is that im very unpatint so its not a great game for me but if you are good with ads I reccomed and if you can i reccomed buying a avatar for 0.99 dollar and it even gets rid of the ads!.(If your reading this have a great day)

This game is awesome! It keeps you entertained when you are on the road! I RECOMMEND this game to anyone who travels alot and/or loves animals and challenges. There is a minor problem though, when you get to... lets say.. the score of 100 hops, the character seems like its going slower and there is some glitches here and there. The ads in this game are not OVERLOADING, so anyone hates ads can enjoy this game.

For a mobile game, I had picked it up as a recommendation from a fellow friend. Little did I know, I would sooner or later be completely indulged in a silly little game where you tap. With no goal, no time limit. Just me, and this game, Crossy Road. An addictive game where you jump forward in order to dodge obstacles, with multiple customizations. Don't get too addicted!

OK, I really like this game! It doesn't have any problems like glitches or bad graphics, cute characters to choose that you earn easily, and barely any ads! What I really like about it is that if you go to settings then to parental controls you can remove the ads ;) Me and my brother love the multiplayer mode and challenge each other to it whenever we are free! I would totally recommend this game to everyone, not a waste of time and pretty cool 👍 But this game deserves 4 stars anyways :D

It's a really fun game! You can choose many characters to use, but you have to win them with your tokens. Some you buy with real money if you want. The only problem... *stares at screen with bulging eyes*... is that the ads sometimes glitch the game and you're sent on this page. *Screams in frustration..!* But other than that it's fun!

This game is very addicting and is really good though. I rated it a 4 star because the ads are so annoying. Even when you go away for like 2 minutes and leave your phone on, the next round after you lose, you get an ad. And when playing they show up like every 2 or 3 minutes and it's super annoying. Other than that good game if you want something quick and fun.

star_5.text: great game for road trips, airplane rides or just when your bored, this game actually doesn't need ads. though the one problem I had was the ads, they are a lot, so if you don't mind spending about five dollars or you don't care about ads you'd love, sorry if I spoiled this for anyone, but before you decide not to play it. Just try, try it once, it's really fun.

words cannot describe how much I love this game. it's fun, I love playing pecking order, there are so many adorable characters that I want to unlock, almost every character except for the ones with game modes attached are able to be unlocked in the prize machine, the art style is so cool, and there aren't ads popping up after literally every single run! Igot the ad blocker pack because I have the money and I'm able to afford it, but it honestly isn't necessary! get it now please!!!!!

Very good free game. You can choose to watch ads or not, and watching ads gives rewards. Also, if you're a computer user, use the arrow keys. The game is really fun and can be challenging at times, but even though I fail alot, I still have alot of fun! All of the crictical reviews are just people who can't appreciate how much time and effort has been put into the game! I've seen the bad reviews, just one star because one feature is bad? Or one star cause you don't like the graphics? Ridiculous!

Absolutely fun. Not to mention how hard the chickens are to get. the Japan section is one of the sections I'm hoping to get anything in. I would recommend it to anyone who has a lot of time on their hands, because it takes a long time grinding for characters. The ads should be removed if you have play pass. But the ads aren't everywhere on the screen, and can actually get a lot of gameplay. The pixelated style is awesome. Also recommend for people who are really good at gaming, just like me.

It's so fun to collect and play, besides from the ads that almost barely pop up. This game is amazing.(edit) i wanted to add that I love that the animals have different effects each. I have the badger right now, and it has a little spotlight, the emu makes it a different scene, and the rainbow chicken changes the scene and cars all the time when your playing. I played this when I was younger and I love it so much! Thank you, hipster whale,for making this game!-your helpful and truthful friend :]

It's a wonderful game and I like how you don't have to pay for that many animals (The ones you have to pay for are avalible form the prize machine). I haven't seen any bugs and I love all of the secret animals. I've only gotten one double (although I only started) and it's easy to get lots of coins. Overall this is great and I believe that it's a great way to spend time, it's totally worth my time!

Love this game, so many fun characters to choose from. Lots of fun, but it can get a little boring after a while of playing on it. Overall, amazing game if you want to distract you for a little while. Maybe you could add levels as a plus little side game and add some goals/achievements to earn more money faster in order to get more characters. Regardless, fun game to play. No bugs, everything works fine. But there is one small issue, I can't seem to download it on my laptop!! Is it my laptop????

I used to play this game when I was WAYYY younger. Being older, I look back on this game with an incredible sense of nostalgia. Even with the AD-pocalypse, the game is still hilarious! And, from a mobile game standpoint, most of the add-ons/ in-app purchases are pretty cheap -- definitely not pay-to-play. I would recommend this game to people with ADHD or for people who have anxiety in public spaces (-- just remember to keep your eyes up if you're crossing the road!!!)

Really fun and there's so many characters to choose from plus a lot of other maps. The daily gift is a big plus and help to getting new characters, plus you can do the daily challenge to mix it up a bit! There's ads, but they're tolerable and you can get rid of them by only buying a singular character for 99 cents. Not a bad deal. Plus a tip, if you turn off your wifi and data, boom no ads! So for me it's a great time killer, and an overall great game!

I absolutely love this game. everything about it is so cute! The characters, the sound effects, the setting, EVERYTHING.! one thing I have a problem with is that it's kinda hard to move. Like swiping side to side and tapping and having to go fast is exhausting. still super fun and everything!!! the intenseness is what makes the game interesting. I guess I'm just bad... Anyways download if u haven't, you won't regret 😍😍

It's an overall amazing game and I really recommend it! There's lots of different characters and no ads unless the game offers you to watch an ad for coins or I think tickets(?) so that's really nice! There is a small bug I've noticed though. I favorited a few characters but unfavorited them after a while, so the bug makes it so I have to go back and unfavorite those characters every time I open the game. Other than that this game is super awesome and I recommend it 100%!!

This game is one of my favorites to play in downtime! I love Pecking Order and competing to beat other players. How others get 852, I have no idea. I do however think the reaction time of the game can be a little slow, for instance I keep getting hit by the same car in Pecking Order, even though I keep tapping it won't move forward. If that could be fixed, that would be great. Keep up the great work with this game, though! I hope it keeps going far (I have no doubt that it will, of course)!!!!!!

This app is so amazing and fun to play! Here are the things I would like added in the future: 1. Add music! 2. Add more daily challenges like 2 pecking orders per day! 3. Add new characters! Those are the things I hope can be added to the game in the future! I also love how there is an option to disable ads, but I still keep ads on so they can keep the game up and running for us to play!

AWESOME game for vegging out when you feel overwhelmed, just need some downtime or have some time to kill. You can play two characters @ once for an added challenge or, if you really want to make it difficult, let a 2nd person control a tandem character! You can play maps just to try to beat your own high score, or play the daily challenge to see how you measure up to other players. Whatever your playing style, Crossy Road won't disappoint!

Crossy Road has became one of the games I use to pass time. Just because its a good game to pass time with. I played this for at least 1-2hours straight which is actually impressive! This game has some good graphics just because the characters, maps, and coins are easy to get. Some people don't think the presents are big enough because you have to wait a long time, but I don't think its to much or to big. Thats just me though. Its easy to get characters and maps you just have to put in effort!

✅ 🐔 Confirmed Crossy Road app, the one and only! Feel good game that is a great choice for wasting time and occasional chuckles. The advertisements are okay because you can choose if you want to watch them or not and you get in game rewards if you do. Easy to learn user interface makes this a great game for all ages. Not too slow, not too fast. I love the 3d block look. Comical sound effects. This game is a permanent addition to my daily driver. Always look both ways before you Crossy Road 🚸

This game is too much fun for how simple it is. The controls are easy to understand, and reliable under pressure (it can get chaotic!). I haven't had to purchase anything yet, and the in-game currency seems to flow steady enough so far. The main purchase-ables seem to be new characters) I highly recommend this if you're looking for a quick, fun game that you could play for a minute or way longer than you care to admit.

One review says "no point in this game, once you get 50 or more characters you get duplicates"..😂 literally the point is in the title "crossy road" the point is to..cross roads. Games don't need to be profound or have deep stories, especially a phone game. It's challenging, it's simple, it works. And for the duplicate characters, that just means you have to grind a bit to get them all, it is not the main goal of the game. They are a phone game and rely on sales from purchased characters or ads

This game is really fun to play! You can get many new FREE characters in this game! By getting coins you can use the gumbala machine to get characters. Everyday you get 2 free gifts that give you coins. You also get a quest every 3 hours to get more coins. Using these coins you can get SO MANY NEW CHARACTERS. The game is so engaging, fun! The only thing I don't like however, is that the gumball machine can give you duplicate characters. This is very annoying and I request the managers to stop.

First things first there are not too many ads (#1 thing people look for). Awesome game to play whenever you want because runs only take a minute (or if your a pro they take like 4 minutes) and you can get so many different characters not only from the prize machine, but by doing secret things too. Overall it's an awesome game I would totally recommend it.
